caption: Sri Rama Pattabhishekam — the coronation of Rama
scene: The coronation of Lord Rama: Rama and Sita enthroned together in Ayodhya, Rama crowned; Lakshmana, Bharata, Shatrughna attending, Hanuman kneeling at their feet in devotion, sages and citizens in reverence. The grand, auspicious centerpiece of the epic.
